data.title: Dash Evolution chain now includes Zcash Orchard privacy pool. Early support for transfers with more features to come for tokenized assets.
data.description: At the outset, the platform will facilitate fundamental transfers, which will lay the groundwork for forthcoming enhancements. These will encompass privacy functions for tokenized tangible assets.

data.title: Wall Street bullish on Nvidia ahead of earnings, analysts highlight strong demand for AI hardware. Guidance crucial for stock valuation. Earnings expectations high. Analysts cite sustained orders for data center platforms, diverse customer base. Focus on future guidance to support assumption of long-term AI spending growth.
data.description: Nvidia, listed as NVDA on NASDAQ, is anticipated to release its next earnings report amid high expectations and positive sentiments from Wall Street analysts, especially Citigroup, who have reiterated their bullish outlook on the stock. The key concern for investors has shifted from beating earnings estimates to whether the guidance provided can support the current valuation predicated on sustained AI hardware demand until 2026 and beyond. Analysts are optimistic due to the continuous orders for Nvidia's latest data center platforms, which have seen a wider customer base including enterprise, government, and international projects. This diversification is likely to help maintain elevated data center revenue even if cloud spending growth in the US slows. Citi has also highlighted Nvidia's product roadmap visibility and the continual upgrades offered to customers, which keeps selling prices high and gross margins supported. Investors now place more importance on future guidance rather than past performance, with the stock's valuation banking on the assumption that AI infrastructure spending will continue to build up long-term. The focus remains on Nvidia's ability to demonstrate a healthy order pipeline in the near future.

data.title: SearchStax is recognized by G2 for Best Data Analytics Software in 2026, reinforcing its leadership in site search.
data.description: In Los Angeles, the SearchStax platform has received G2 recognition for its significant impact on modern digital discovery, further solidifying its position as a leader in site search. This acknowledgment highlights the platform's effectiveness in improving online experiences.

data.title: Aprimo named DAM leader by Forrester Wave 2026, scoring 4.38/5 and top in Current Offering category.
data.description: Chicago-based company Aprimo, specializing in digital asset management (DAM) and content operations, has been acknowledged as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Digital Asset Management Systems, Q1 2026. Aprimo received the highest rating in the Current Offering category with a score of 4.38 out of 5, surpassing all other vendors. This recognition highlights Aprimo's dedication to assisting enterprises in efficiently managing content through intelligent automation.

data.title: Foodtastic acquires Central Social Hall, a Canadian casual dining brand, to strengthen its portfolio. Founded in 2012 by Rota and Kupina.
data.description: Foodtastic has recently acquired Central Social Hall, a renowned Canadian premium casual dining and social hall brand established in 2012 by Jerry Rota and Jesse Kupina. This acquisition aligns with Foodtastic’s goal of incorporating prominent Canadian brands into its collection of banners, as well as broadening its presence in dining concepts suitable for daily dining and social events. Central Social Hall is recognized for its chef-led menus, specially crafted drinks, and community-centered hospitality.

data.title: Bojangles brings back the Bojangler Fish Sandwich for Lent on Feb. 23. Features crispy Alaskan Pollock filet.
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C., Bojangles is reintroducing a sought-after item that fans anticipate annually: the Bojangler® Fish Sandwich, available starting February 23. This limited-time offering, available across all outlets, features the signature bold and irresistible taste that defines Bojangles. Just in time for the Lenten period, guests can savor the crispy Alaskan Pollock filet, breaded with panko crumbs and seasoned with Bo’s Famous Sea, as they seek a seasonal seafood alternative.

data.title: IS Partners, LLC achieved ANAB accreditation for ISO/IEC 27001 certification services, expanding global audit capabilities.
data.description: In Dresher, Pennsylvania, on February 19, 2026, IS Partners, LLC revealed that it has obtained official accreditation from the ANSI National Accreditation Board (ANAB) to conduct ISO/IEC 27001 audits. IS Partners is a prominent company specializing in IT audit, cybersecurity, and compliance services. This accreditation marks a significant achievement for IS Partners and highlights its expertise in this field.

data.title: Depot Connect International sells Industrial and Rail Services to Clean Harbors for $130 million.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on February 19, 2026, Depot Connect International (DCI) declared its definitive agreement to sell its Industrial Services and Rail Services division to Clean Harbors (NYSE: CLH) for around $130 million. This deal marks a significant step for both companies as they expand their operations in the sector.
